meaning: n.力量、兴趣、活动等的中心
examples: These cells are called melanopsin ganglion cells.
Like rods and cones, these ganglion cells are found in the retina.
"We have special receptors on our retinas, called photoreceptive ganglion cells."
Octopuses have hundreds of suckers, each one equipped with its own ganglion with thousands of neurons.
